summary: Iteration 40: Two-Tier Rejection System Testing - 13/13 tests PASSED (100%)

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request. Backend-only testing performed.

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Phase 1 permanent rejection): PASS - Sets status='permanently_rejected', stores rejection_reason, rejection_type='permanent', rejected_by, rejected_at, rejected_phase='phase1'

Feature 2 (Phase 1 reconsider rejection): PASS - Sets status='draft', stores rejection_reason, rejection_type='reconsider', resets supervisor_phase1_approved=False and implant_incharge_phase1_approved=False
Feature 3 (Phase 1 reconsider resubmit): PASS - After reconsider rejection, student can call request-phase1-approval again, status changes from draft to pending_phase1
Feature 4 (Phase 2 permanent rejection): PASS - Sets status='permanently_rejected', stores phase2_rejection_reason, phase2_rejection_type='permanent', rejected_phase='phase2'
Feature 5 (Phase 2 reconsider rejection): PASS - Sets status='phase1_approved', stores phase2_rejection_reason, phase2_rejection_type='reconsider', resets phase2 approval flags
Feature 6 (Notifications): PASS - Both rejection types send notifications to case creator. Permanent: 'permanently rejected', Reconsider: 'rejected with consideration'
Feature 7 (Full flow): PASS - Create -> Phase1 approve (both) -> Submit Phase2 -> Reconsider reject Phase2 -> Status=phase1_approved -> Resubmit Phase2 -> Status=pending_phase2
Feature 8 (Permanently rejected blocks actions): PASS - permanently_rejected status returns 400 on request-phase1-approval and approve endpoints
Feature 9 (rejection_type field): PASS - ApprovalAction model accepts rejection_type='permanent' or 'reconsider', defaults to 'permanent' when not specified
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test procedures during testing with prefix TEST_TwoTierRejection: P1_PERM, P1_RECON, P1_RESUB, P2_PERM, P2_RECON, NOTIF_PERM, NOTIF_RECON, FULLFLOW, BLOCK_P1, BLOCK_APPROVE, TYPE_PERM, TYPE_RECON, TYPE_DEF
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-tier rejection system fully verified. Key flows: 1) Phase 1 rejection: permanent->permanently_rejected, reconsider->draft with approval flags reset. 2) Phase 2 rejection: permanent->permanently_rejected, reconsider->phase1_approved with phase2 flags reset. 3) Student can resubmit after reconsider rejection by calling request-phase1-approval (Phase 1) or submit-phase2 (Phase 2). 4) permanently_rejected status blocks all further approval actions with 400 error. 5) Notifications include rejection type label ('permanently rejected' or 'rejected with consideration'). 6) rejection_type field in ApprovalAction model accepts 'permanent' or 'reconsider', defaults to 'permanent'.

tested_features.phase1_permanent_rejection: PASS - status=permanently_rejected with all rejection fields
tested_features.phase2_permanent_rejection: PASS - status=permanently_rejected with phase2 rejection fields
tested_features.rejection_type_defaults_permanent: PASS - defaults to 'permanent' when not specified

tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/request-phase1: 200 - Changes draft to pending_phase1, 400 on wrong status
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/approve (rejec: 200 - Resets status to draft (Phase1) or phase1_approved (Phase2)
tested_endpoints.GET /api/procedures/{id}: 200 - Returns procedure with all rejection fields
